caption: You weakling! Can't even stay off your phone!
Wow, back already? That was pathetic.
Your goals are crying right now.
Discipline called. It doesn't know you.
Even a goldfish has better focus than you.
Future you is so disappointed right now.
Breaking your own promises? Classic you.
The blocked app isn't going anywhere. Neither is your progress.
Focus mode means FOCUS. Put the phone down!
Your willpower has left the chat.
